---
title: "Resampling Lung Data"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-09-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}

#Loading the Candida count data

Candida_normalize_counts <- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/recrad/exploratory/data/Candida_human_normalizecount_allcancer.csv") %>%
  filter(Disease_Specific == "Lung Cancer")


Pre_data <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv"),
                     read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv")) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(RNASeq != "") %>%
  select(RNASeq, ORIENAvatarKey) %>%
  rename(sample = RNASeq) 


```


```{r}
Candida_normalize_counts<- Candida_normalize_counts %>% left_join(Pre_data,by = "sample") %>% drop_na()

# Making sure we are using the same sample

samples<- Candida_normalize_counts$ORIENAvatarKey

##

Diagnosis <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Diagnosis_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Diagnosis_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% samples) %>% select(AvatarKey,AgeAtDiagnosis) %>% 
  filter(! AgeAtDiagnosis == "Unknown/Not Applicable") %>%
  filter(! AgeAtDiagnosis == "Age Unknown/Not Recorded") %>%
  mutate(AgeAtDiagnosis = ifelse(grepl("Age 90 or older", AgeAtDiagnosis), "90", AgeAtDiagnosis))

### Taking the latest diagnostic time

Diagnosis <- Diagnosis %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtDiagnosis) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtDiagnosis, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup()

Vital_status<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_VitalStatus_V4.csv"),
                           read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_VitalStatus_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% samples) %>% select(AvatarKey,VitalStatus,AgeAtLastContact,AgeAtDeath) %>% filter(!VitalStatus == "Lost to follow-up")

### Considering the latest vital status
Vital_status<- Vital_status %>% group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtLastContact) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtLastContact, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup()
  

survival<- Diagnosis %>% left_join(Vital_status, by = "AvatarKey") %>% drop_na()

survival_2<- survival %>% mutate(
  AgeAtDiagnosis = as.numeric(AgeAtDiagnosis),
  status = case_when(VitalStatus == "Alive" ~ 0,
                            VitalStatus == "Dead" ~ 1),
  AgeAtLastContact = ifelse(grepl("Age 90 or older", AgeAtLastContact), "90", AgeAtLastContact),
  AgeAtLastContact = as.numeric(AgeAtLastContact),
  # Use AgeAtDeath if available, otherwise AgeAtLastContact
  diagsurvtime = AgeAtLastContact - AgeAtDiagnosis
  )

```

```{r}



### merging All data (Count, survival)

Final_mtsurv<- Candida_normalize_counts %>% rename(AvatarKey = ORIENAvatarKey ) %>% left_join(survival_2, by="AvatarKey")

## Re-arranging the file
Final_mtsurv<- Final_mtsurv %>% select(sample,AvatarKey,Disease_Group,Disease_Specific,Candida, Human_count, Normalize_Candida,status,diagsurvtime)

Final_mtsurv<- Final_mtsurv %>% distinct() %>% drop_na()

Final_mtsurv <- Final_mtsurv %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  slice_max(status, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Prefer status == 1 over 0
  ungroup()



write_rds(Final_mtsurv, "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Lung_resampled_data.rds")

```
